response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, and native-level Japanese proficiency, while his experience is heavily focused on web, mobile, and full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript environments with no evidence of embedded networking, switch firmware, or security protocol implementation (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X).
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (e.g., CI/CD, test frameworks)
Demonstrated ability to learn and deploy diverse technologies in complex systems
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C in embedded Linux or kernel-level development
Lacks any mention of networking security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal)
Native-level Japanese proficiency is absent; only English and Romanian are fluent
